organization.short_description:
NFM Lending is a multi-state residential mortgage lender founded in 1998 in Baltimore, Maryland. The company started as a small brokerage and has since grown to over 400 employees and more than 35-42 branches across the United States. NFM Lending is licensed in 49 states and Washington, D.C., funding approximately $7 billion in home loans annually.

The company, known as **America's Common Sense Lender®**, focuses on understanding clients' unique financial situations to recommend suitable mortgage products. NFM Lending emphasizes honesty, integrity, and a streamlined process from application to closing. Its corporate operations are centralized at a state-of-the-art headquarters in Linthicum, Maryland. NFM Lending specializes in residential mortgages, offering home purchase loans, refinances, and construction loans, among other products. The company has received numerous accolades, including recognition as one of the Top 100 Mortgage Companies in America and a Top Workplace.

Unlike other lenders, we prioritize building personal connections, maintaining transparency, and offering continuous support throughout the entire mortgage journey.

At Nation One Mortgage, we understand that each loan is more than just a transaction—it's an opportunity to make a difference in someone's life. That's why we go the extra mile to ensure that all parties involved are set up for success.

We empower our loan officers with flexibility to grow their business according to their vision, supported by a leadership team dedicated to providing the tools and resources needed for success.

Get in touch with us today and see why so many homeowners and mortgage professionals trust Nation One Mortgage as their go-to partner. Let's make your homeownership goals a reality—together!

Equal Housing Lender | NMLS# 128501

Mortgage America is the number one lender in Eastern PA for over 38 years, with 15 billion dollars in Eastern PA  originations, and thousands of loans serviced. From first call to after closing Mortgage America is here to serve you.

Our main office is headquartered in Whitehall. Opening our doors more than 38 years ago, we were established in response to the region's growing demand for community-based home loans. As a locally owned and operated pioneer in mortgage banking, we are proud of our reputation as an expert in local housing markets with the necessary resources to provide fast, locally made decisions.

Over the years, our in-depth industry knowledge and community dedication have allowed us to expand our regional footprint, giving more customers access to smart mortgage solutions. Our Loan Officers are now available to help home buyers at eleven Mortgage America offices. From these conveniently located offices, our Mortgage America team has completed thousands of loans for our customers throughout Eastern Pennsylvania.

When a customer speaks with one of our Loan Officers, they are talking to a member of their community, and in many cases, someone who has worked at Mortgage America for years, if not decades. This is true of our other team members as well. Mortgage America's entire staff, from our Loan Officers to our Loan Processors, from our Underwriters to our Closers, are seasoned professionals that take enormous pride in their work. Unlike other lenders, our team members have deep roots in this region as well as a wealth of local knowledge and industry expertise that they can apply to their work. Our staff stays current on changes within the local markets as well as changes to federal and state programs and policies. The beneficiaries of our team's experience and education is our customers, who receive the information they need to decide which loan best fits their specific needs.

The company specializes in home purchase, refinance, and home equity loans, emphasizing low rates and fast approvals. With over 340 branches across 47-50 states and more than 4,000 agents, Rate operates nationwide and offers services through online applications, mobile apps, and in-person support.

Rate utilizes advanced technology to streamline the mortgage process, providing quick preapprovals and one-day mortgage approvals. The company offers a variety of mortgage options, including fixed-rate, adjustable-rate, FHA, VA, and specialized loans for unique borrower needs. Key programs include PowerBid Approval for competitive bidding and OneDown for low-to-moderate income borrowers, which provides down payment assistance. Rate is committed to serving diverse customer profiles, including Spanish speakers and self-employed individuals, while maintaining a focus on transparency and customer service.

organization.name: CMG Financial
organization.raw_address: 3160 Crow Canyon Road, Suite 400, San Ramon, CA 94583, US
organization.short_description:
CMG Financial is a privately-held mortgage banking firm founded in 1993 and based in San Ramon, California. The company operates as a leading mortgage lender across all 50 states and the District of Columbia, holding federal agency lending approvals with various agencies including HUD, VA, and FNMA.

CMG Financial offers a range of mortgage lending products and services through three main origination channels: retail lending via CMG Home Loans, wholesale lending, and correspondent lending. The company has over 240 retail branches and more than 700 loan officers nationwide. One of its notable innovations is HomeFundIt™, a down payment gifting platform that has assisted over 2,500 families in purchasing homes.

Recognized for its growth and performance, CMG Home Loans ranked as the #6 retail lender in the nation in 2024. The company is known for its responsible lending practices and has received accolades as a top mortgage employer and lender. Additionally, CMG Financial supports community initiatives through the CMG Foundation, established in 2012.
